sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation.CurationTags.Partition

Packages that use CurationTags.Partition
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Classes for curation of reconstructions, as implemented by the "Curation Assistant".

  • Uses of CurationTags.Partition in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation that return CurationTags.Partition
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CurationTags.Partition
    CurationTags.partitionByReviewStatus(Collection<Path> paths)
    Sibling of CurationTags.partitionByReviewStatus(Tree) that accepts any iterable of paths.
    static CurationTags.Partition
    CurationTags.partitionByReviewStatus(Tree tree)
    Splits a Tree's paths into four buckets by review status: positive, negative, unsure, and unreviewed (no cur:* tag).
